criteria.name: Clarity and Articulation
criteria.description: Can the candidate explain ideas clearly and concisely?

scores.1: Poor - Rambling, unclear, hard to follow
scores.3: Adequate - Generally clear with some tangents

criteria.name: Active Listening
criteria.description: Does the candidate listen to questions and respond directly?

scores.1: Poor - Misses the question, gives unrelated answers
scores.3: Adequate - Addresses the question with minor drift
scores.5: Excellent - Directly addresses every question with relevant detail

criteria.name: Objection Handling
criteria.description: How does the candidate respond to pushback or challenges?

scores.3: Adequate - Acknowledges objections but lacks technique
scores.5: Excellent - Reframes objections confidently with structure

criteria.name: Prospecting Knowledge
criteria.description: Does the candidate understand outbound prospecting workflows?

scores.1: Poor - No understanding of outbound sales process
scores.3: Adequate - Basic understanding of cold outreach
scores.5: Excellent - Deep knowledge of multi-channel prospecting

criteria.name: Drive
criteria.description: Does the candidate show hunger and self-motivation?

scores.3: Adequate - Shows interest but limited intensity
scores.5: Excellent - High energy, clear goals, competitive drive

criteria.name: Coachability
criteria.description: Is the candidate open to feedback and learning?

scores.1: Poor - Defensive about weaknesses, dismisses feedback
scores.3: Adequate - Accepts feedback but doesn't elaborate
scores.5: Excellent - Gives specific examples of learning from feedback

criteria.name: Availability and Logistics
criteria.description: Can the candidate meet schedule and location requirements?

scores.1: Poor - Major conflicts or unclear availability
scores.3: Adequate - Available with minor flexibility needed

criteria.name: Culture Alignment
criteria.description: Does the candidate seem aligned with a fast-paced startup environment?

scores.1: Poor - Prefers highly structured, slow-paced environments
scores.3: Adequate - Adaptable but untested in fast-paced settings
